Instruction: Walk straight along the paved path with the yellow tactile strip, keeping the large, curved glass building with 'E8' illuminated on top to your left. Continue past the building's entrance, which has blue lights visible inside. Proceed to the crosswalk with yellow and white stripes painted on red asphalt and cross it. After crossing, follow the path as it curves to the right, walking between the trees. Pass the blue pedestrian crossing sign and the red and blue circular sign on your left. Stop when you reach the tall, dark grey rectangular sign with a white 'P' and '> P2' on your right. You have arrived at your destination.
